suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Create .factory/skills/config-worker/SKILL.md with the config-worker skill procedures. Multiple features (remove-deprecated-assets, consolidate-memory, fix-stale-references) specify skillName 'config-worker' but the SKILL.md file does not exist at .factory/skills/config-worker/. Workers are completing tasks using base tools, but the skill file should exist for proper skill invocation.
